entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the plant species studied for its resistance to insect pests.

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: Spotted stem borer, a Lepidopteran insect pest that attacks Sorghum bicolor.

entities.name: LABEL-FREE QUANTITATIVE PROTEOMICS
entities.description: A proteomics approach used to identify and quantify proteins in Sorghum bicolor genotypes.

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of certain Sorghum bicolor genotypes to withstand infestation by Chilo partellus.

entities.name: DEADHEART
entities.description: A symptom caused by Chilo partellus boring through the plant stem, hampering cob development.

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to identify proteins correlating with insect resistance or susceptibility.

entities.name: GENE ONTOLOGY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to categorize the biological functions of C. partellus-responsive proteins.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis performed on selected candidate proteins to mimic C. partellus infestation.

entities.name: PROTEIN AND AMINO ACID BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Biological process suppressed in Sorghum bicolor upon C. partellus infestation.

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Biological process maintained by induced proteins during C. partellus infestation.

entities.name: STRESS AND DEFENSE
entities.description: Plant response mechanisms involved in resisting C. partellus infestation.

entities.name: SMALL MOLECULE BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Biological process involved in the response of resistant Sorghum genotypes to C. partellus.

entities.name: AMINO ACID METABOLISM
entities.description: Biological process involved in the response of resistant Sorghum genotypes to C. partellus.

entities.name: CATALYTIC AND TRANSLATION REGULATION ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Biological activities associated with proteins in resistant Sorghum genotypes.
